entry.title: Actualizar Webpack a Vite en Laravel Sail

link.title: Actualizar Webpack a Vite en Laravel Sail

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Laravel acaba de agregar soporte para Vite, una herramienta para desarrollo frontend muy poderosa, y tú puedes usarla si realizas unos pequeños cambios, como sugiere la página oficial para esta migración. Pero si además estás utilizando Sail, que es una útil herramienta para integrar Docker en tu entorno de desarrollo, además tendrás que hacer algunos otros cambios.

entry.title: Upgrading Webpack to Vite in Laravel Sail

link.title: Upgrading Webpack to Vite in Laravel Sail

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Laravel has just added support for Vite, a very powerful frontend development tool, and you can use it if you make some small changes, as suggested on the official page for this migration. But if you are also using Sail, which is a useful tool for integrating Docker into your development environment, you will also have to make some other changes.

entry.title: ¿Qué navegador usar?

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Necesitas un navegador para entrar a Internet. Y seguramente usas uno a diario. Pero, ¿qué es precisamente un navegador? ¿Qué navegador podría ser mejor para ti? ¿Qué es un navegador? Un navegador es un software que te permite navegar por internet. Es decir, visualizar páginas web y aplicaciones web. Como cualquier otro software, existen una gran variedad de navegadores y muchos sirven a diferentes propósitos.

entry.title: Función para esperar algo

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: En este artículo quiero mostrarte algunas cosas acerca del lenguaje de programación JavaScript mediante el uso de una función que servirá para «esperar».

entry.title: Comenzando con petite-vue

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: ¿Por qué conformarnos con un framework (Vue), cuando podemos tener una versión «minimizada» de este, con un coste menor tanto de construcción como de carga? petite-vue apunta justo a eso. Pero, ¿qué es justamente y cómo se usa? Veámoslo.

entry.title: Crear un PDF con HTML y CSS

link.title: Crear un PDF con HTML y CSS

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Para crear PDF existen una gran variedad de herramientas; personalmente encuentro el uso de HTML y CSS sencillo, por lo que quiero mostrarte cómo hacer un PDF a partir de estos dos lenguajes de programación

entry.title: Como googlear

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Googlear, es decir, buscar información con un buscador web (específicamente Google) no es una tarea trivial, y conforme pasa el tiempo se convierte en algo cada vez más difícil ya que hace falta criterio para encontrar lo que buscas. Sin embargo es una tarea escencial en el ámbito de la programación.

entry.title: Cómo preguntar

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: ¿Por qué es tan importante saber preguntar? Bueno, haciendo las preguntas adecuadas llegas más rápido a la respuesta que buscas. Y primero lo primero, si algo hace falta a la hora de resolver problemas es entender precisamente cual es el problema. Así que una vez identificado, tienes que preguntar…

entry.title: Sí, uso Dvorak

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Desde Abril del 2016 (aproximadamente), me di cuenta que el teclado QWERTY no es la unica distribución que existe, y me dispuse a aprender a escribir en otra, Dvorak, que obtiene su nombre de su creador: August Dvorak

entry.title: Tareas en cola, Laravel (Servidor compartido)

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>{"at"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "md5"=>"ef78513325e3391167f441f930067fef"}, "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: No quería demasiado retraso en las peticiones que enviaban un correo, así que decidí utilizar el QUEUE_CONNECTION=database en el archivo de configuración (.env) y así comienza ese “largo” camino a usar una cola en Laravel para ciertas tareas que llevan poco más de 1 segundo, en este caso notificaciones.
